title: haplophyllum arbuscula
intro: Haplophyllum arbuscula, also known as the Tree Mistletoe or Dwarf Barberry, is a species of flowering plant in the Rutaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Haplophyllum arbuscula include its potential to reduce fever, treat digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. Haplophyllum arbuscula can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and stems are often used in traditional medicine.
